announcements.title: Scheduled Maintenance
announcements.message: We will be performing scheduled maintenance on June 5 from 02:00–04:00 UTC. Expect brief interruptions.

announcements.title: Degraded Performance
announcements.message: Some users may experience slower response times. Our team is investigating.

announcements.title: Incident Resolved
announcements.message: The earlier issue has been fully resolved. All systems are back to normal.
